---

name: Scientific or data review
about: Report or discuss equations, units, assumptions, rate constants, or wastewater matrix data
title: "[Science/Data]: "
labels: science, data
assignees: ""
-------------

## Topic

What scientific, kinetic, engineering, or data issue should be reviewed?

## Location

Indicate the related file, module, example, or documentation page.

Example:

```text
src/aop_framework/scavenging.py
data/representative_effluent_matrix.csv
docs/theory.md
```

## Issue type

Select the most relevant category:

```text
- equation
- unit conversion
- rate constant
- concentration value
- wastewater matrix assumption
- kinetic interpretation
- reactor/process interpretation
- documentation wording
- other
```

## Current content or behavior

Describe the current equation, value, assumption, or interpretation.

## Proposed correction or improvement

Describe the proposed correction or improvement.

## Scientific basis

Provide references, reasoning, calculations, or experimental context if available.

## Units and conditions

Please specify units and conditions where relevant.

Examples:

```text
temperature:
pH:
matrix type:
concentration units:
rate constant units:
```

## Engineering implication

Explain how this issue affects AOP interpretation, treatment-time estimation, radical utilization, energy demand, or treatment-train screening.

## Additional notes

Add any other relevant information.
